title: pseudostellaria oxyphylla
intro: Pseudostellaria oxyphylla, also known as Chinese mountain cobaea or huang qin, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Pseudostellaria oxyphylla is often used to make teas, capsules, and infusions, which are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
